connect.hoursofoperation.hoursofoperatio: Contains information about the hours of operation.

connect.hoursofoperation.hoursofoperatio.Description: The day that the hours of operation applies to.
connect.hoursofoperation.hoursofoperatio.Allowed values: FRIDAY | MONDAY | SATURDAY | SUNDAY | THURSDAY | TUESDAY | WEDNESDAY

connect.hoursofoperation.hoursofoperatio.Description: The end time that your contact center closes.
The start time that your contact center opens.
